# Joseph V. Hoffer — Criminal Defense Attorney
# Hoffer Defense — Of Counsel, RMR Legal PLLC
# 70 North Ocoee Street, Cleveland, Tennessee 37311
# (423) 463-0360 | JoeHoffer@hofferdefense.com
# https://www.hofferdefense.com

## About

Joseph V. Hoffer is a criminal defense attorney with nearly four decades of experience in state and federal courts. He practices as Hoffer Defense, Of Counsel to RMR Legal PLLC, at 70 North Ocoee Street in Cleveland, Tennessee. He is licensed in all Tennessee state courts and the United States District Court for the Eastern District of Tennessee.

Joe is a former state and federal prosecutor who now applies his insider knowledge to defend clients in Bradley County, Polk County, the Ocoee region, and the Eastern District of Tennessee. He is fully bilingual in English and Spanish and serves the Hispanic community throughout the region without the need for an interpreter.

## Career Summary

- Assistant Prosecutor, Cuyahoga County Prosecutor's Office, Cleveland, Ohio (1989–1997): General Felony Division, Child Protection Coalition, Three Times Bulk Narcotics Division
- Federal Prosecutor, U.S. Attorney's Office, District of Puerto Rico (1996–1998): Major drug trafficking, HIDTA narcotics cases, weapons, immigration, and child exploitation. Spanish fluency essential.
- Assistant District Attorney General, Tenth Judicial District, Tennessee (1998–2004 and 2015–2026): General criminal litigation in Bradley and Polk Counties across Criminal Court, Sessions Court, and Juvenile Court. Pioneered cryptocurrency prosecution in the district.
- Private Criminal Defense Practice, Cleveland, Tennessee (2004–2015): Federal Indigent Panel / CJA attorney (2005–2015), Eastern District of Tennessee.
- Current: Hoffer Defense — Of Counsel, RMR Legal PLLC. Active criminal defense practice in state and federal courts. Currently defending clients in the Eastern District of Tennessee.

## Credentials

- Tennessee Bar No. 008976
- Admitted: Tennessee state courts and Eastern District of Tennessee federal court
- CJA Panel attorney — Eastern District of Tennessee
- CLE instructor on cryptocurrency investigation and blockchain evidence for Tennessee law enforcement
- Juris Doctor, University of Akron School of Law, 1987
- Bachelor of Arts (Economics, German minor), John Carroll University, 1984
- Languages: English (native), Spanish (fluent), German (working knowledge)

## Practice Areas

### Federal Criminal Defense
https://www.hofferdefense.com/federal-defense.html
Eastern District of Tennessee federal criminal defense. Drug trafficking, conspiracy, firearms, fraud, cryptocurrency, immigration, supervised release violations. Former federal prosecutor with experience in major Caribbean drug cartel cocaine importation cases. CJA appointed counsel available.

### Cryptocurrency and Digital Asset Defense
https://www.hofferdefense.com/cryptocurrency-defense.html
One of Tennessee's foremost authorities on blockchain evidence and digital asset crimes. Pioneer cryptocurrency prosecutor in Tennessee. CLE instructor for Tennessee law enforcement on blockchain evidence methodology. Defends cryptocurrency fraud, theft, money laundering, and federal digital asset charges. Familiar with blockchain analytics platforms and admissibility challenges.

### Search and Seizure Defense
https://www.hofferdefense.com/search-seizure.html
Fourth Amendment and Tennessee Constitution Article I Section 7 search and seizure defense. Traffic stops and vehicle searches, home and business warrants, cell phone and digital device searches, consent searches, warrant affidavit defects, Miranda and interrogation violations, GPS tracking and surveillance. Motion to suppress practice in Bradley County, Polk County, and the Eastern District of Tennessee.

### DUI Defense
https://www.hofferdefense.com/dui-defense.html
DUI defense in Bradley County, Polk County, and the Ocoee region. Challenges to the stop, field sobriety test administration, breathalyzer calibration and certification, blood test chain of custody, and probable cause for arrest. First through aggravated DUI offenses.

### Drug Offense Defense
https://www.hofferdefense.com/drug-defense.html
State and federal drug defense across all charge levels — simple possession through federal trafficking conspiracy. Diversion programs, judicial diversion, drug court, and pretrial diversion explained and pursued where available. Asset forfeiture defense. Bradley County, Polk County, and Eastern District of Tennessee.

### Juvenile Criminal Defense
https://www.hofferdefense.com/juvenile-defense.html
Juvenile delinquency, status offenses, detention hearings, adjudicatory hearings, disposition hearings, probation violations, and transfer to adult court defense. Bradley and Polk County juvenile courts. Record expungement available for eligible juveniles under Tennessee law.

### Defensa Criminal en Español
https://www.hofferdefense.com/defensa-en-espanol.html
Full criminal defense services in Spanish. Joe Hoffer is fully fluent in Spanish and serves the Hispanic community in Bradley County, Polk County, and the Ocoee region without the need for an interpreter. All practice areas available in Spanish — state and federal court.

### Attorney Fees and Consultations
https://www.hofferdefense.com/attorney-fees.html
Flat fee and hourly fee arrangements explained. CJA appointed counsel available for qualifying defendants in federal court. Initial consultation free. Fee discussion begins with understanding the facts of the case.

## Geographic Coverage

Primary: Bradley County, Polk County, Ocoee Region, Cleveland Tennessee
Federal: Eastern District of Tennessee
Spanish-language services: Bradley County, Polk County, Ocoee Region
